subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou seest me turning toward Thee, detached from all save Thee, and holding fast to the cord of Thy bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قولی الهی الهی ترانی مقبلة الیک منقطعة عن دونک و متمسکة بحبل عطائک
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for nearness to God, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
